title: AGENTS.md OpenAI synthesis evaluator runbook cross-link v0
problem: Tickets 393-397 and ticket-397 documented the live OpenAI synthesis evaluator canary runbook in README and agent docs, but AGENTS.md Operator Loop does not cross-link the evaluator spine, plan status fields, or mock-first safety boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md cross-links README Live OpenAI synthesis evaluator canary runbook and tickets 393-397 spine.
AGENTS.md documents openai_synthesis_evaluator_status plan field and mock-first vs operator live canary boundary.
non_goals: Live OpenAI HTTP in CI or tests.
